calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SECURITY RESEARCH ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Motion For Attorney'S Fees.

Plaintiff Security Research Associates, Inc.'s motion for attorney's fees is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party to submit a proposed order and an amended judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176, geales@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)

***Proposed order submitted to the contest email had more language. Party to resubmit proposed order and amended ***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Allison Cherry Lafferty
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SECURITY RESEARCH ASSOCIATES, INC.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment in its favor and against defendant Building Energy, Inc. in the amount of $16,298.22 plus costs and attorney's fees per the post-judgment procedures set forth in the Code of Civil Procedure and California Rules of Court. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
